config.ji_afkcinematic.title: Ji AFK Cinematic — Settings
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.shot_dura: How long each cinematic shot will last before cutting to another.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.afk_thres: Time without input before the cinematic automatically starts.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.max_cycle: Maximum number of shots to show before returning to standard view.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.camera_sp: Multiplier for how fast the camera travels in each shot.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.damage_ac: Action to take when you take damage while AFK.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.show_name: Toggles your name tag visibility when in third person during AFK.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.letterbox: Enables cinematic black bars on the top and bottom of the screen.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.music: Enables random C418 background music while in cinematic mode.
config.ji_afkcinematic.tooltip.keybind: Press to bind a new key to open this interface.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.ji-afk-ci: AAA Cinematic camera for AFK players with configurable shots, constant smooth camera, damage protection, and in-game settings.
